chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No. D-1231 of 2024 “Ramzan and others vs. Bhoro Khan and others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No.2766/ 2025. 2. For order on M.A.No.4118/2023. 27.10.2025. None present for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Raheem Chandio advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. = This Constitutional Petition was filed on 04-08-2022 and same was dismissed for non-prosecution on 11-05-2023. Thereafter, learned counsel for the petitioner filed restoration application under Order IX Rule 9 C.P.C r/w section 561-A Cr.P.C (M.A No.4118/2023). Today, petitioner and his counsel are called absent; same was the position on last date of hearing viz 04-08-2025. The conduct of the petitioner and his counsel shows that they have lost their interest to pursue restoration application bearing M.A No.4118/2023, therefore, same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Saleem*
